race_meta.race_name: DragonBet The Roar Before Cheltenham Welcome Offer Handicap Hurdle

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner walkinthepresent (ire) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Walkinthepresent with 28.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Walkinthepresent > Mancero, but actual result was Walkinthepresent (IRE) > Lady Caro (IRE). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
